releases.changelog: Initial harness plugin with 9 agents, GAN-like evaluation, sprint contracts
Consolidated 9 agents to 6, fixed colon filenames, simplified coordinator to 2-agent loop

11 enhancements: codex toggle, domain profiles with BA foundation, feature dependencies, cost tracking, GAN docs, subjective quality grading, sprint retrospectives, feature maturity levels, config file
Restructured for Claude Code marketplace (nested plugins/harness/ pattern), fixed hooks.json from array to record format
Fixed codex review detection (mandatory pre-flight), expanded artifact enforcement, runtime verification requirement, created harness-sdlc domain skill

Created harness-ea Enterprise Architecture domain skill (10 sections: TOGAF/Zachman/FEAF methodology, ArchiMate modeling guide, 8 industry reference architectures, architecture repository structure, anti-patterns), strengthened releaser invocation
